name: Beef Congee (or a Thick Gloppy Rice Dish)
recipeIngredient: 1 Inch piece of ginger, sliced into 5-6 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the rice and four times its volume of stock/water into a thick bottomed pan.
2. Add the star anise, garlic, ginger, salt, pepper, and half the spring onions. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the rice turns into a thick glop – about 40 minutes. Add more water if needed.
4. Remove and discard the remaining spring onions.
5. Add the beef and cook for two minutes.
6. Add the beans and cook for another two minutes.
7. Chop the remaining spring onions and add them, along with a dash of sesame oil. It goes very well with Chinese chilli sauce and/or soy sauce.
